# GitHub Actions Workflows

This directory contains CI, coverage, security, and dependency update workflows for this template.

- `ci.yml`: Lint, test, and build on push/PR
- `coverage.yml`: Upload test coverage to Codecov
- `codeql.yml`: Run CodeQL static analysis
- `gosec.yml`: Run gosec for security
- `golangci-lint.yml`: Run golangci-lint for linting
- `dependabot.yml`: Automated dependency updates
